completed_tasks.name: v2.0 milestone — audit (re-audit after gap closure)
v2.0 milestone — complete, archive, tag v2.0, push
v3.0 milestone — research (4 parallel researchers + synthesis)

remaining_tasks.name: v3.0 milestone — roadmap creation (phases, build order, traceability)
v3.0 milestone — begin phase planning and execution

decisions.decision: v3.0 scope: 3 pillars — flexible FDS structure, LLM provider abstraction, engine visibility
decisions.rationale: User wants system-first approach instead of EM-first, multi-provider LLM support, and engineer-facing docs engine viewer

decisions.decision: Project type A/B/C/D and decomposition model are independent dimensions
decisions.rationale: A/B/C/D classifies project nature (new/extension/modification/retrofit); decomposition describes system structure. Any type can use any model.

decisions.decision: All 4 decomposition models in v3.0 including hybrid
decisions.rationale: User wants full flexibility from day one: isa88_em, functional, process_flow, hybrid

decisions.decision: Custom decomposition model builder + FDS extraction skills
decisions.rationale: User wants /doc:create-decomposition and /doc:extract-decomposition to allow custom structures and importing from customer FDS documents

decisions.decision: Full LLM abstraction with fallback chains and cost logging
decisions.rationale: Both provider flexibility and IP-sensitive local deployment; includes token tracking per project

decisions.decision: Prompt variant strategy deferred to planning
decisions.rationale: Research flagged that provider-specific prompt variants are needed, but exact approach (file-based vs code-based) deferred

decisions.decision: Full engine visibility including P2 items
decisions.rationale: Template browser, traceability, changelog, verification criteria browser, template health indicators

next_action: Create v3.0 roadmap: spawn gsd-roadmapper agent to break 29 requirements into phases with build order. Research suggests ~6 phases. Use /gsd:new-milestone to continue roadmap creation, or manually run roadmapper.
context_notes: Session covered: executing Phase 16, re-auditing v2.0, completing/archiving v2.0 milestone (tag pushed), then starting v3.0 — questioning, 4 parallel research agents, synthesis, and requirements definition. Research files in .planning/research/ (STACK.md, FEATURES.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, PITFALLS.md, SUMMARY.md). Key research insight: prompt portability doesn't exist — provider-specific variants mandatory. Build order suggestion from research: schema contract → LLM abstraction → flexible structure → engine visibility.
